goal: Extend Omega Wave Editor so saved window layout presets also persist and restore panel popout window bounds for panel-file-explorer, panel-effects, and panel-timeline.
constraints: Keep changes tightly scoped to the existing window layout and popout infrastructure.
Prefer adding small IPC helpers instead of large refactors.
Use the existing saved popout bounds behavior in the main process rather than inventing a second storage system.
Only touch files that are necessary for this feature.
Run a relevant local check if practical.
success_criteria: A saved window layout preset can include popout bounds for the three panel popouts.
Loading a saved window layout restores those saved popout bounds before or while reopening the popout panels.
Typecheck or an equivalent relevant local check is reported.
